4. How registries work - find registry files (likely JSON or TS files that register components)
5. Look for any registry index files that list all components
6. Look at how context-based compound components are implemented (accordion, tabs, etc.)

Be thorough - I need to know:
- Where component source files live
- Where demo/example files live
